name: mik-worker
description: MIK (MICE Insight Korea) — Cloudflare Worker Backend

scripts.deploy:pages: bash scripts/verify-pages-build.sh && npx wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name mik-dashboard
scripts.build:pages: rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist && cp MIK_MICE_Insight_Korea.html dist/index.html && cp og-image.png dist/og-image.png 2>/dev/null || true
